problem: compareVersions(a, b) in version.mjs compares dotted version strings and should return -1, 0, or 1. It currently compares them as plain strings, so it gets '1.10.0' vs '1.9.0' wrong (10 is greater than 9) and treats '1.2' and '1.2.0' as different. Fix it so all cases in test.mjs pass: compare each dot-separated part numerically, treating missing trailing parts as zero.
